body:
Implementation plan added to issue description.

- New files: `src/types/readAloud.ts`, `src/lib/readAloud.ts`, `src/hooks/useReadAloud.ts`, `src/components/ReadAloudPanel/*`
- Modified: `src/app/story/[id]/page.tsx` (add textareaRef, sidebar 'readAloud' mode), `page.module.css`
- Key decisions: Web Speech API for playback (graceful fallback if unsupported); textarea-level sentence jump via setSelectionRange; 3 issue detectors (repetition/long-sentence/dialogue-clarity) are static analysis with no AI/API; panel-driven navigation since inline textarea highlight is not feasible

Assign to: Code Monkey
Recovery ticket; previous issue stuck (checkout 409) and cancelled. Previous: BIN-88.
